title: Gooporeal's Lichen
description: Changes glow lichen to look less like vines, with a 3d block model.
body:
Changes glow lichen to look less like vines and gives it a model that is 3d. Designed to make it more distinct and less likely to be confused for diamond ore. 
![Glow Lichen displayed on a wall](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dt87gAGj/images/7ef15a685e5a0af237a23be85a9b99a828fe890b.png)
